sections.markdown:
- Activity: Lunch Run
- Started: 2026-01-30 11:03
- Distance: 4.9 km
- Moving time: 28:42
- Elapsed time: 28:58
- Elevation gain: 94.2 m
- Average heart rate: 177 bpm
- Max heart rate: 197 bpm
- Average watts: 217.5 W
- Average speed: 10.2 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `240` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `177.0 bpm`, ranging from `85.5` to `197.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `166.3 bpm` and second-half average HR was `187.6 bpm` (+21.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `169.7 spm`, with a working range of `100.0` to `210.0 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `174.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `165.2 spm` (-8.9 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:54 /km` across `4.869 km` in `28:42` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:25 /km` and second-half pace was `6:22 /km` (+56 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `177.0 bpm` average and `197 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `164.9 bpm` in the first half and `187.2 bpm` in the second (+22.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `28:42` out of `28:58` elapsed (99.1%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `6` stop segments and `0.7%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `98.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `30.0 m` and `63.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `40.0 m` in the first half and `58.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
